prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild dormitory, Kaelen Ironheart, a masculine young adult in a reinforced leather armor and guild cloak, steps toward Haru Brightford, a feminine trader in a neat vest and sash. A glowing mana crystal on a wooden table flickers erratically. Kaelen reaches out, placing his hand near Haru's to channel a steadying, soft blue magical aura, stabilizing the light. Cinematic, warm lighting, high-fantasy aesthetic, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Haru Brightford looks at Kaelen with a relieved smile, adjusting her grip on her ledger tablet as the mana crystal settles into a calm, steady glow. The two characters maintain their coordinated posture, Kaelen's hand still guiding the magical flow. Consistent character designs, cozy dormitory interior, fluid motion, no text, no watermark.
